actionCalls.name: Copy_1_of_Submit_for_Final_Approval
actionCalls.label: Copy 1 of Submit for Final Approval

choices.name: I_ve_Update_the_Review_Field
choices.choiceText: I've updated the Content Source Field

decisions.description: Prevents users who aren't the assigned as the reviewer from proceeding
decisions.name: Copy_1_of_Is_flow_user_the_curren_reviewer
decisions.label: Copy 1 of Is flow user the curren reviewer?

decisions.description: Prevents users who aren't the assigned as the reviewer from proceeding
decisions.name: flow_user_the_next_reviewer
decisions.label: Is flow user the next reviewer?

decisions.description: Prevents users who aren't the assigned as the reviewer from proceeding
decisions.name: Is_flow_user_the_current_reviewer
decisions.label: Is flow user the curren reviewer?

decisions.description: Prevents users who aren't the assigned as the reviewer from proceeding
decisions.name: Is_flow_user_the_next_reviewer3
decisions.label: Is flow user the next reviewer?

decisions.description: Prevents users who aren't the assigned as the reviewer from proceeding
decisions.name: Is_flow_user_the_next_reviewer5
decisions.label: Is flow user the next reviewer?

decisions.description: Prevents users who aren't the assigned as the reviewer from proceeding
decisions.name: Is_flow_user_the_next_reviewer6
decisions.label: Is flow user the next reviewer?

decisions.description: Prevents users who aren't the assigned as the reviewer from proceeding
decisions.name: Is_flow_user_the_next_reviewer7
decisions.label: Is flow user the next reviewer?

decisions.description: Prevents users who aren't the assigned as the reviewer from proceeding
decisions.name: Is_flow_user_the_next_reviewer8
decisions.label: Is flow user the next reviewer?

decisions.description: Checks to see if there is a primary approver. If there isn't a primary reviewer than all responsibilities get sent to secondary approver which is why we need to check.
decisions.name: Is_Primary_Approver_Id_Blank
decisions.label: Is Primary Approver Id Blank?

decisions.description: determines if we have to resolve an approval before moving forward
decisions.name: Is_there_an_active_approval
decisions.label: Is there an active approval?

decisions.description: Checks to see if there is a primary approver. If there isn't a primary reviewer than all responsibilities get sent to secondary approver which is why we need to check.
decisions.name: Primary_Approver_Id_Blank_published
decisions.label: Primary Approver Id Blank?

decisions.description: checks to see what status the knowledge review is in
decisions.name: StatusofReview
decisions.label: Status of Review

Flow.description: Second iteration of the content review flow that is based off draft knowledge articles 1/13/2025 - updates to check for secondary reviewer

formulas.description: Truncates manager Id to 15 characters so it can be compared to running user id
formulas.name: fTruncateManagerIdInLoop

formulas.description: Somehow the Running User Id truncates the User ID from 18 characters to 15. This formula compares the first 15 of Running User and Reviewer User ids
formulas.name: IsRecordOwnerRunningUserOrHigher
formulas.expression: OR( {!IsRunningUserContentManager} = TRUE, LEFT({!varPrimaryReviewer}, 15) = LEFT({!$User.Id}, 15), LEFT({!varSecondaryReviewer}, 15) = LEFT({!$User.Id}, 15), LEFT({!varRecordOwner}, 15) = LEFT({!$User.Id}, 15) )

formulas.description: Checks to see if running user is primary reviewer or higher
formulas.name: IsRunningUserPrimaryReviewerorHigher
formulas.expression: OR( {!IsRunningUserContentManager} = TRUE, LEFT({!varPrimaryReviewer}, 15) = LEFT({!$User.Id}, 15), LEFT({!varSecondaryReviewer}, 15) = LEFT({!$User.Id}, 15) )

Flow.label: Content Review Flow v2

loops.description: stores manager IDs in a single variable
loops.name: Loop_Managers
loops.label: Loop Managers

recordLookups.description: gets all content manager ids from Utopia_Content_Managers so they can be stored and used to execute review process
recordLookups.name: Get_All_Content_Managers
recordLookups.label: Get All Content Managers

recordLookups.description: Content managers should be able to execute all areas of the review cycle regardless of if they are a primary or secondary reviewer. A public group gets the IDs of all managers and the flow will check if the running user is a running manager. If they are then the flow will allow them to proceed with any review
recordLookups.name: Get_Content_Manager_Public_Group
recordLookups.label: Get Content Manager Public Group

recordLookups.description: Gets the knowledge article related to this review
recordLookups.name: Get_Knowledge_Article
recordLookups.label: Get Knowledge Article

recordLookups.description: Gets knowledge review on DRAFT articles
recordLookups.name: Get_Knowledge_Review
recordLookups.label: Get Knowledge Review

fields.name: ErrorMessage
fields.fieldText: Error: This record failed to enter the content approval process. Please check to make sure this record is not already in an active approval

fields.name: Copy_2_of_ErrorMessage
fields.fieldText: Error: This record failed to enter the content approval process. Please check to make sure this record is not already in an active approval

fields.name: InitialReviewComplete
fields.fieldText:
Review Complete!

Click Here to navigate to your review

fields.name: Copy_1_of_DisplayNotUserMessage
fields.fieldText: You are not assigned as the current reviewer of this record

fields.name: NotInReviewDisplay
fields.fieldText: This review is not currently active. Please reach out to Nicole Peters with questions.

fields.name: CommentsWarning
fields.fieldText: Review comments are limited to 255 characters. For longer comments, use the (OG) chatter feature

fields.name: FailureMessage
fields.fieldText: Approval process failed please retry flow and contact Nicole Peters

fields.name: DisplayNotUserMessage
fields.fieldText: You are not assigned as the current reviewer of this record

fields.name: review_checklist_response
fields.fieldText: Before completing your review make sure you've:

variables.description: checks to see if running user a content manager so they can execute any aspect of the review
variables.name: IsRunningUserContentManager

variables.description: Id of the article that the review is being conducted on
variables.name: recordId

variables.description: stores Ids for Content managers like Denise and Antonio
variables.name: varContentManagerIds

variables.description: Utopia_Content_Managers group id used to query for members of the group
variables.name: varManagerPublicGroupId

variables.description: stores primary reviewer from the knowledge review record
variables.name: varPrimaryReviewer

variables.description: stores the secondary reviewer from the knowledge review record
variables.name: varSecondaryReviewer
